title: Investigate C/C++ MISSING semicolon divergences
description: Multiple C and C++ files show divergences where Go inserts (MISSING ";") but C doesn't, or vice versa. Files: networking.c, server.c, server.h (C/redis), descriptor.cc (C++/protobuf). Need to identify the specific code patterns triggering this and whether it's an error recovery difference or a parsing logic bug. Also investigate transfer.c and url.c which have other error recovery differences.
